productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Feather lite Blue Caps
description: Composition Royal blue featherlight tennis cap made of 100% polyester and recycled content, with small mesh panels on the crown, nike Swoosh embroidered on the front of the crown, Velcro fastener at the back, and engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Comfort Wash care Hand wash in warm water at 40 degrees Do not wring, bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Whether you're playing at the French Open, US Open or the local tennis court, you need to look your best on the court. This royal blue Featherlight tennis cap from nike will look perfect on you, when you're cheering for your favorite tennis player, or serving an ace yourself. All you environmentalists will be glad to know that this cap is made with recycled content. Engineered with Nike's Dri Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable. This smart cap is super light, so you barely know that it's on your head, protecting you from the sun or jazzing up your outfit! Team it with your casual clothes for a sporty look.
